author: lOrm
content:
Resolved via shared single-source-of-truth slash command table.

Both seams now iterate src/slash_commands.rs::SLASH_SECTIONS:
- TUI overlay (src/tui/components/help.rs) renders KEYBIND_SECTIONS (TUI-only) then iterates SLASH_SECTIONS for the slash-command sections.
- CLI printer (src/cli/repl/slash.rs::slash_help) iterates SLASH_SECTIONS for the slash-command sections; CLI-only affordances (shell !cmd, notes #text, @path, multiline) remain inline.

Drift is no longer possible by construction: adding a command is one edit in src/slash_commands.rs and both seams pick it up. The TUI overlay previously listed ~13 commands; it now lists the same ~57 the CLI exposes (CORE 41 + MEMORY 6 + ACTIVITY 4 + PLUGIN 5 + SKILLS 2).

Tests: 1661 lib pass (+3 vs 1658 baseline: 2 in slash_commands, 1 in help overlay). cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features exit 0. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. Forbidden modules untouched.
